MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christina Mintz, Esq. (818.501.3800 Ext. 117; cmintz@hrhlaw.com) of Hemar, Rousso & Heald, LLP for Plaintiff via Zoom audio.
Marckus Lopez (non-party) (702.482.6968) on behalf of his grandfather, Tu Le.

The court does not allow argument by non-party.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF VW CREDIT, INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION'S Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing.
VW Credit, Inc.'s unopposed application for writ of possession is granted.

Order is signed.
